channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Street lamps x2, 14th June
item.description:
Street lamps not working

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Broad Oak Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping mylne apartments bin area, 14th June
item.description:
Someone has fly tipped in the bin area of mylne apartments - this wasn’t any resident of mylne apartments - the garage doors have been broken for a long time and anyone can gain entry from the street. Metropolitan housing have done nothing to fix the garag

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barretts Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking fire access and driveway, 14th June
item.description:
Blocking emergency access and driveway to 4 garages.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bike hanger, 14th June
item.description:
Outside 16 Tudor Road, there is white/silver spray paint on the green painted metal surface of the bike hanger here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Tudor Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bags of clothing ., 14th June
item.description:
Last seen there p.m. 14th.June
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Men’s toilets Willet Rec vandalised, 14th June
item.description:
Toilet seat has been pulled off and there’s graffiti in the men’s toilet within willet Rec.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Towncourt Crescent, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on right hand side of street cabinet, 14th June
item.description:
White spray graffiti depicting "oops" on the right hand side of a green painted metal of a street cabinet. Found on the junction of Tudor road, Gable end of 1 Belvedere Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Tudor Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two boxes filled with empty laughing gas cannisters, 14th June
item.description:
Two cardboard boxes of what I believe to be a large number of laughing gas cannisters

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 210, Venner Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is a tree backside of my shop. All the leaves are fall under the my promises and the rainy season all the mess inside the shop and my car is also damaged because of the branches fell down, 14th June
item.description:
It’s going long time .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 203, Petts Wood Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 60 Cambridge road, 14th June
item.description:
Street lights not working

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ardlui Road SE27 at the side of 90 Idmiston R, 14th June
item.description:
Ardlui Road SE27 at the side of 90 Idmiston Road on Ardlui Rd footpath is a lump of concrete which is a bit bigger than a football. (Would suggest more than one person to lift and gloves as rough surface.) Please forward fixmystreet.com report for reporting pin and picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ardlui Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pit hole, 14th June
item.description:
Serious health and safety issue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norman Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gipsy Road SE27 9QY outside number 255 (H, 14th June
item.description:
Gipsy Road SE27 9QY outside number 255 (House of MOBO) three bicycles chained to cycle parking hoops which ‘seem’ dumped. The cycle with both wheel has a ‘abandoned’ sign on it but does not look like it is a Lambeth sign. The two with no front wheels been present for some time. Please forward fixmystreet.com link for reporting pin &, picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 255, Gipsy Hill, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping next yo Alan's Plants, 14th June
item.description:
Hi there, I raised this issue previously and nothing has been done so far. Can I please ask that this is addressed promptly. Best, L

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tunnel Avenue, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 14th June
item.description:
6 New Cross road Please clear flytip

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, New Cross Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Try-tying under A2 Bridge, 14th June
item.description:
Hi there, I addressed this a while ago and nothing hasn't been done yet. Can I please ask that the area under the bridge is cleaned and fly-tipping removed urgently. Best, L

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tunnel Avenue, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite 17 Kingswood Avenue NW6, 14th June
item.description:
Discarded cardboard packaging

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingswood Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Woolwich Road - full of fly-tipping & littler, 14th June
item.description:
Hi there, Can I please ask that Woolwich Road is regularly cleaned? It's a pretty bad state atm. It requires weekly cleaning & I urge the council to address that as soon as possible. Best, Lidia

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kitchen units dumped on path, 14th June
item.description:
Broken kitchen units and a chair dumped on path.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Peckham Rye, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gipsy Road SE27 9QY number 253 (Day L, 14th June
item.description:
Gipsy Road SE27 9QY number 253 (Day Lewis pharmacy) green plastic road sweeper’s bag bin tagged. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin &, picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 255, Gipsy Hill, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
